items.title: Vince Carter Is VERY Excited To See The Ja Morant & Damian Lillard Pairing In Portland 👀 | Cousins

author.display_name: Cousins with Vince Carter & Tracy McGrady

items.body_excerpt: Vince Carter can't wait to see what Ja Morant and Damian Lillard can do together in Portland. 👀🏀 @xfinity The NBA legend explains why he's excited about the potential pairing of Morant and Lillard, how their skill sets could complement each other, and why the Trail Blazers could…
